title: Clinical Psychology Master's Program Application and Fees
content:
Clinical Psychology Master's Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Fall

Semester

Online Applications will start on 02.06.2025

.

Application Deadline: 27.07.2025, Sunday

The Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

PROGRAM FEES:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fee

ALES Score Type

In the Fall Semester of the 2025-2026 Academic Year, 15 new students will be admitted to the thesis program and 30 new students to the non-thesis program in our Clinical Psychology Master's Programs.

In accordance with the Postgraduate Education Regulation published in the Official newspaper dated November 22, 2019, special students will be evaluated by the Department of Clinical Psychology only on the condition that they are registered in another clinical psychology graduate program.

FOR THE CLINICAL PSYCHOLOGY MASTER'S PROGRAM (THESIS or without THESIS), THE SCIENCE EXAM WILL NOT BE TAKEN AT 2025-2026 FALL SEMESTER STUDENTS ACCEPTANCE.

In order to apply to the program (thesis), candidates must have taken the ALES exam and must have received at least 55 points from the

Equal Weight point type

.

-In Master's Programs (Thesis), 65% of the ALES in the relevant score type and 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average will be additioned and placed in the ranking.

-In the calculation of the non-thesis program score, 50% of the Equal Weight point type ALES score and 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average converted to the 100-point system will be taken as a basis.

-The system will automatically assign 55 points for applicants who do not have an ALES score when applying to the non-thesis program.

The applications of the candidates of those who don’t apply online or hadn’t graduate at the time of application, or those who don’t upload the ALES document of the last 5 years for the thesis program and the document showing the undergraduate graduation grade point average to the application system will be deemed invalid.

According to the decision of our Rectorate, only graduates of the Psychology, Psychological Counseling and Guidance programs will be admitted to the Clinical Psychology Graduate Program.

Information on scholarships:

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/yuksek-lisans-burslari

– The original and a photocopy of the undergraduate diploma

– The original and a copy of the undergraduate transcript

– ALES Exam result document (for thesis program)

– Copy of the Identity Card

– Photo (4 Pieces)

– Reference Letter is not required.
